user_goal: Audit whether README.md accurately reflects current implementation and identify any mismatches requiring edits.

mandates.title: README mutation execution
mandates.objective: Perform the approved documentation correction directly in README.md via write_file full-content update.
method: Modify only line about OPENAI_API_KEY precedence to match ai_engine_config.resolve_api_key order.
Write back full README.md using write_file.
evidence_requirements: State exact old and new sentence.
stop_conditions: README line updated and verified in file content.
